'''âs-d-h-sh''' ('''kasadheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vamose|vamose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vamose|vamose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-d-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasadheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadheshoko|thisadheshoko]] || [[word:jisadheshoko|jisadheshoko]] || [[word:shisadheshoko|shisadheshoko]] || [[word:kisadheshoko|kisadheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusadheshoko|thuthusadheshoko]] || [[word:jujusadheshoko|jujusadheshoko]] || [[word:shushusadheshoko|shushusadheshoko]] || [[word:kukusadheshoko|kukusadheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusadheshoko|thusadheshoko]] || [[word:jusadheshoko|jusadheshoko]] || [[word:shusadheshoko|shusadheshoko]] || [[word:kusadheshoko|kusadheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusadheshoko|thusadheshoko]] || [[word:jusadheshoko|jusadheshoko]] || [[word:shusadheshoko|shusadheshoko]] || [[word:kusadheshoko|kusadheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesadheshoko|thesadheshoko]] || [[word:jesadheshoko|jesadheshoko]] || [[word:shesadheshoko|shesadheshoko]] || [[word:kesadheshoko|kesadheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosadheshoko|thothosadheshoko]] || [[word:jojosadheshoko|jojosadheshoko]] || [[word:shoshosadheshoko|shoshosadheshoko]] || [[word:kokosadheshoko|kokosadheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosadheshoko|thosadheshoko]] || [[word:josadheshoko|josadheshoko]] || [[word:shosadheshoko|shosadheshoko]] || [[word:kosadheshoko|kosadheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosadheshoko|thosadheshoko]] || [[word:josadheshoko|josadheshoko]] || [[word:shosadheshoko|shosadheshoko]] || [[word:kosadheshoko|kosadheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsadheshoko|thĂŠsadheshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠsadheshoko|jĂŠsadheshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠsadheshoko|shĂŠsadheshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠsadheshoko|kĂŠsadheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasadheshoko|thathasadheshoko]] || [[word:jajasadheshoko|jajasadheshoko]] || [[word:shashasadheshoko|shashasadheshoko]] || [[word:kakasadheshoko|kakasadheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasadheshoko|thasadheshoko]] || [[word:jasadheshoko|jasadheshoko]] || [[word:shasadheshoko|shasadheshoko]] || [[word:kasadheshoko|kasadheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasadheshoko|thasadheshoko]] || [[word:jasadheshoko|jasadheshoko]] || [[word:shasadheshoko|shasadheshoko]] || [[word:kasadheshoko|kasadheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasadheshithi|shasadheshithi]] || [[word:shasadheshiji|shasadheshiji]] || [[word:shasadheshishi|shasadheshishi]] || [[word:shasadheshiki|shasadheshiki]]

|-
